name: io.github.whitemagic-ai/whitemagic
description: Cognitive operating system for AI agents — persistent memory, associative recall, ethical governance, and self-awareness across sessions. 28 Gana meta-tools covering 374 capabilities, organized by the Chinese Lunar Mansions.

environmentVariables.name: WM_MCP_PRAT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 for PRAT mode (28 meta-tools) or 0 for classic mode (374 individual tools)

environmentVariables.name: WM_SILENT_INIT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to suppress startup logs

environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_HOST
environmentVariables.description: URL for local Ollama LLM server (optional, for local inference)
